scenario-title: Empty-string custom-resolver rejected — create_escrow with empty resolver string fails
scenario-purpose: Verify that create_escrow rejects an empty-string custom-resolver with :invalid-resolver. Empty strings are not valid resolver addresses and must be rejected at creation time.
scenario-notes: custom-resolver is set to empty string "". The create-escrow lifecycle guard at lifecycle.clj:312 rejects it with :invalid-resolver. This prevents creating an escrow with an unusable resolver. Both custom-resolver and resolution-module empty-string boundaries are handled by the same guard.
